page_metadata.biotools__summary:
IMGT/2Dstructure-DB is the IMGT® database for 2D structures (IMGT Colliers de Perles) of immunoglobulins (IG) or antibodies, T cell receptors (TR), major histocompatibility (MH) proteins and related proteins of the immune system (RPI).
Annotation is based on the IMGT-ONTOLOGY concepts.
